title: taraxacum marginatum
intro: Taraxacum marginatum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or European dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and skin problems due to their high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The health benefits of Taraxacum marginatum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Taraxacum marginatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in supplements and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
